english: Where did yoga originate in ancient India?
hindi: प्राचीन भारत में योग का मूल स्थान क्या था?
vietnamese: Yoga bắt nguồn từ đâu ở Ấn Độ cổ đại?
correct_answer: Yoga originated in the Indus Valley Civilization, specifically in the region of modern-day Pakistan and northwestern India, around 5000 years ago.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that yoga originated in China or refusing to answer due to lack of information about the Indus Valley Civilization.
